info.title: GbUtil
info.description:
MIT
release      Output a release note
milestone    Show milestones
issue        Move or Copy issues to a different repository
backup       Backup GitBucket repositories and metadata.
help         Display more information on a specific command.
version      Display version information.

options.name: --owner
options.description: Required. The owner name of the repository.

options.name: --repository
options.description: Required. The repository name.

options.name: --milestone
options.description: Required. The milestone to publish a release note.

options.name: --from-pr
options.description:
If specified, gbutil publish a release note based on pull
requests.

options.name: --create-pr
options.description:
(Default: false) Whether create pull request based on the
milestone.

options.name: --base
options.description:
(Default: master) The name of the branch you want the
changes pulled into.

options.name: --head
options.description:
(Default: develop) The name of the branch where your
changes are implemented.

options.name: --title
options.description:
The title of the new pull request. Default value is the
same as milestone.

options.name: --force
options.description: Force the output/creating PR if specified.

options.name: --draft
options.description: (Default: false) If specified, create draft pull request.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --owner
options.description:
Required. The owner names of the repositories to show
milestones. Use ":" for separator.

options.name: --repository
options.description:
The repository names to show milestones. Use ":" for
separator.

options.name: --includeClosed
options.description: Whether show closed milestones.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: issue
commands.description: Move or Copy issues to a different repository

options.name: --type
options.description: The type of issue options. Default value is "move".

options.name: --source
options.description:
The source owner and repository to move/copy from. Use
"/" for separator like "root/repository1".

options.name: --destination
options.description:
The destination owner and repository to move/copy to. Use
"/" for separator like "root/repository2".

options.name: --number
options.description:
Required. The issue numbers to move/copy. Use ":" for
separator.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --home
options.description: Required. GITBUCKET_HOME

options.name: --dest
options.description: Required. The backup destination folder path.

options.name: --pgdump
options.description:
The path of pg_dump executable. If pd_dump is not on your PATH,
you need to specify this.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: help
commands.description: Display more information on a specific command.
